creator: cb34@fureai.or.jp
text:
(In reply to Christos Chatzaras from comment #26)
The order of the links is as shown on the man page of ld-elf.so.1.

The environment variable LD_LIBRARY_PATH is not set.

When I commented on Comment #17, I thought the error occurred because dynamic linking was performed using only file names and /usr/local/lib had a higher priority due to LD_LIBRARY_PATH, etc., and that was loaded.
